sections.paragraph:
ἐνίοτε adv. (Eur., Hippocr. et al.; PCairZen 362, 25 [242 b.c.]; Sir 37:14; TestJob) sometimes Mt 17:15 v.l.; 2 Cl 19:2 (based on Syr. tr.)—B. 987. DELG s.v. ἔνιοι.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PCairZen PCairZen = Zenon Papyri, Catalogue général . . . du Musée du Caire—List 4

TestJob TestJob = Testament of Job—List 2

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

Syr. Syr. = Syriac

  1. tr. = translate, etc.
  2. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 337
